case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA vs. NATIONAL AUTOMOBILE & CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NATIONAL AUTOMOBILE & CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY BALLESTRASSE BAIL BONDS $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $83.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,083.00, NOTATION DONE ON ORIGINAL INSTRUMENT PER C.R.C. 522
